scripts.dev: rm -rf apps/web/.next && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green ".venv/bin/uvicorn apps.api.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload --reload-dir packages/python/src --reload-dir apps/api" "pnpm --filter @kr-law-rag/web dev"
scripts.artifacts:clean: rm -f data/artifacts/laws.sqlite data/artifacts/article_embeddings.npy data/artifacts/article_embedding_ids.json data/artifacts/manifest.json data/artifacts/state.sqlite
